Rule [sd-css-dead-class-pf-v5-u-color-200]:
The CSS class 'pf-v5-u-color-200' was removed in the new version. A simple version prefix swap to 'pf-v6-u-color-200' does NOT produce a valid class — this class does not exist in the target CSS distribution.

Remove this class reference or replace it with appropriate custom CSS or a PatternFly component prop.

### Fix 4
Lines: 262, 396
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

Incident context:
  componentName: Button
  module: @patternfly/react-core
  parentFrom: @patternfly/react-core
  parentName: Tooltip

### Fix 5

Rule [sd-test-tooltip-transitive-behavioral-changes]:
Tooltip is affected by behavioral changes in rendered sub-components:
- Tooltip renders Popper which has a behavioral change: Default value for 'appendTo' prop on Popper changed from 'inline' to () => document.body

Tests for Tooltip may need updating. Fix options depend on the specific change:
- For portal changes: use waitFor(), popperProps=, or within(document.body)
- For role/DOM changes: update getByRole() queries to match new roles
- For attribute changes: update querySelector/getAttribute calls

If a migration change makes existing variables, state, or logic redundant, clean up the affected code so the file remains correct and consistent.

For each test file, check whether your changes to the main file would cause test failures (e.g., portal rendering means getByText/getByRole won't find dropdown content, renamed attributes break selectors). content.text:
Now let me reason through all the fixes:

**Fix 1**: `ButtonVariant.link` is still a valid variant in the new type. The type just added `'stateful'`. No code change needed — the existing value is compatible.

**Fix 2**: Modal migration — move `title` and `description` props into `<ModalHeader>`. Add `ModalHeader` and `ModalBody` imports. Wrap existing children in `<ModalBody>`.

**Fix 3 & 6** (same location): `pf-v5-u-color-200` is removed with no equivalent. Replace with inline style for the muted text color, or use `--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle` which is the PF6 design token for secondary/muted text.

**Fix 4**: The Buttons at lines 262 and 396 don't contain icon elements — they contain `{title}` (ReactNode text) and `{consistencyGroupsCount[namespace]}` (a number). No icon migration needed.

**Fix 5**: Informational about Tooltip test changes. No production code change needed.

**Fix 7**: Replace `Text` with `Content` in imports and all JSX usages.

Now let me apply all changes:

Command exited with code 1

All clean. The file has been fully updated with all applicable changes.

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (Lines 264, 397)
**No change needed.** The value used (`ButtonVariant.link`) is valid in both the old and new type definitions. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option; no existing values were removed.

### Fix 2 — Modal family migration (Lines 452-453)
**Applied.** Moved `title` and `description` props from `<Modal>` to a new `<ModalHeader>` child component. Wrapped the existing `<ConsistencyGroupsContent>` children in `<ModalBody>`. Added `ModalBody` and `ModalHeader` to the import statement from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 3 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` removed (Line 407)
**Applied.** Replaced `className="pf-v5-u-color-200"` with `style={{ color: 'var(--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle)' }}` using the PF6 design token for subtle/muted text color. This was applied together with Fix 7 (Text → Content).

### Fix 4 — Icon children to `icon` prop on Button (Lines 262, 396)
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance contains icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. Line 264's Button contains `{title}` (a ReactNode text prop) and line 398's Button contains `{consistencyGroupsCount[namespace]}` (a numeric value). The rule only applies when `<Button>` wraps icon components.

### Fix 5 — Tooltip transitive behavioral changes (Line 35)
**No change needed.** This is an informational/test-only rule about behavioral changes in Tooltip's rendered sub-components (Popper `appendTo` default change). No production code changes are required, and no companion test files were listed.

### Fix 6 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` removed (Line 407)
**Applied (combined with Fix 3).** Same location and same issue as Fix 3. Both were addressed together by replacing the removed CSS class with an inline style using the PF6 design token.

### Fix 7 — Replace `<Text>` with `<Content>` (Line 34)
**Applied.** Replaced `Text` import with `Content` in the `@patternfly/react-core` import block. Updated all 5 JSX usages of `<Text>` / `</Text>` to `<Content>` / `</Content>` (lines 361, 366, 373, 379, 409). The `component` and `className` props were preserved as-is since they are supported on `<Content>`.

### Fix 4
Lines: 262, 396
Rule [sd-icon-children-to-prop-button]:
In PatternFly v6, icon content in <Button> must be passed to the `icon` prop instead of as children.

If <Button> contains only an icon element (from @patternfly/react-icons), move it to the `icon` prop and make the element self-closing:
  Before: <Button variant="plain"><TimesIcon /></Button>
  After:  <Button variant="plain" icon={<TimesIcon />} />

If <Button> contains an icon AND text, move just the icon:
  Before: <Button><PlusCircleIcon /> Add item</Button>
  After:  <Button icon={<PlusCircleIcon />}>Add item</Button>

## Changes Applied

### Fix 1 — `Button.variant` type changed (Lines 264, 397)
**No change needed.** The value used (`ButtonVariant.link`) is valid in both the old and new type definitions. The type change only added `'stateful'` as a new option; no existing values were removed.

### Fix 2 — Modal family migration (Lines 452-453)
**Applied.** Moved `title` and `description` props from `<Modal>` to a new `<ModalHeader>` child component. Wrapped the existing `<ConsistencyGroupsContent>` children in `<ModalBody>`. Added `ModalBody` and `ModalHeader` to the import statement from `@patternfly/react-core`.

### Fix 3 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` removed (Line 407)
**Applied.** Replaced `className="pf-v5-u-color-200"` with `style={{ color: 'var(--pf-t--global--text--color--subtle)' }}` using the PF6 design token for subtle/muted text color. This was applied together with Fix 7 (Text → Content).

### Fix 4 — Icon children to `icon` prop on Button (Lines 262, 396)
**No change needed.** Neither Button instance contains icon elements from `@patternfly/react-icons`. Line 264's Button contains `{title}` (a ReactNode text prop) and line 398's Button contains `{consistencyGroupsCount[namespace]}` (a numeric value). The rule only applies when `<Button>` wraps icon components.

### Fix 5 — Tooltip transitive behavioral changes (Line 35)
**No change needed.** This is an informational/test-only rule about behavioral changes in Tooltip's rendered sub-components (Popper `appendTo` default change). No production code changes are required, and no companion test files were listed.

### Fix 6 — CSS class `pf-v5-u-color-200` removed (Line 407)
**Applied (combined with Fix 3).** Same location and same issue as Fix 3. Both were addressed together by replacing the removed CSS class with an inline style using the PF6 design token.

### Fix 7 — Replace `<Text>` with `<Content>` (Line 34)
**Applied.** Replaced `Text` import with `Content` in the `@patternfly/react-core` import block. Updated all 5 JSX usages of `<Text>` / `</Text>` to `<Content>` / `</Content>` (lines 361, 366, 373, 379, 409). The `component` and `className` props were preserved as-is since they are supported on `<Content>`.
